name: @skkac/pilot-inspector
description_en: Pilot Inspector — A silent sidecar governance agent for Pi that audits workflow, prompt health, and context hygiene at compaction boundaries. Phase 4: Compaction guard, cross-session trends, auto skill generation.
description_zh: Pilot Inspector — Pi 的静默侧车治理代理，在压缩边界处审核工作流、提示健康和上下文卫生。第 4 阶段：压缩防护、跨会话趋势、自动技能生成。
